title: 988 MENTAL HEALTH AND SUICIDE LIFELINE - 211info
text: HOMELESS OUTREACH & ADVOCACY PROJECT 988 MENTAL HEALTH AND SUICIDE LIFELINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF County crisis line providing support for people experiencing mental health issues, thoughts of suicide, or other crises. 694 Church Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 988 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline 988 Alternate (503) 581-5535 Text Short Code 988 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, chat, or visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near the intersection of Union and Church Streets. On various primary bus routes. Walking distance from downtown core area. Services: Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS OUTREACH AND ADVOCACY PROJECT TRANSPORTATION - CHERRIOTS DAY PASSES UTILITIES - EMERGENCY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
